title: bassia iranica
intro: Bassia iranica is a flowering plant species belonging to the Chenopodiaceae family, commonly known as the saltwort or glasswort family. It is a shrub-like plant native to Iran, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves, stems, and seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Bassia iranica may be consumed in the form of teas, decoctions, or infusions to reap its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
